name: Cheery Cherry Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 oz) EAGLE (R) BRAND SWEETENED CONDENSED MILK
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, beat the cream cheese until light and fluffy.
2. Add sweetened condensed milk; blend thoroughly.
3. Stir in lemon juice and vanilla.
4. Pour mixture into prepared pie crust.
5. Chill for at least 3 hours or until well set.
6. Top with desired amount of cherry pie filling before serving.
7. Refrigerate leftovers.
